source_jobs.title: Middle Office - Product Control Analyst
source_jobs.description:
The Product Control function is central to the firm’s financial integrity, providing independent validation and analysis of trading P&L and risk. This role is perfect for a sharp, proactive individual with a foundational knowledge of Product Control who is eager to deepen their expertise in financial instruments within the rapidly evolving cryptocurrency market. You will be an essential link between the Trading team and Management, ensuring accurate reporting and robust financial controls.



What you'll be doing:

 - Daily compilation, substantiation, and reporting of Profit and Loss (P&L) and balance sheet movements across various cryptocurrency and digital asset products.

 - Execute daily trade and position reconciliations across internal systems and exchange platforms to identify and resolve discrepancies (breaks) quickly and independently.

 - Provide insightful analysis of P&L drivers, risk exposures, and market trends to key stakeholders, including Management and the Trading team. This includes explaining significant variances and product performance.

 - Act as a robust and credible partner to the Front Office, Market Risk, and Operations teams.

 - Identify and execute opportunities for improving efficiency and controls within the Middle Office workflow, including delivering tactical solutions with minimal senior involvement.

 - Contribute to the control design and operational readiness for new financial instruments and trading strategies launched by the trading team.



What we're looking for:

 - Relevant experience in a Middle Office, Product Control, or Financial Control function, ideally within a bank or FinTech firm.

 - Must possess a keen interest in understanding deeper into financial instruments/products, especially in the digital asset or traditional fixed income/FX space.

 - Good Excel and VBA skills are essential for reporting and automation.



What’s in for you:

 - Friendly and fun start-up work culture

 - Convenient work location located in the heart of CBD area

 - Generous annual leaves on top of national holidays

 - Medical coverage including GP, Specialist, TCM and more

 - Self-care benefits and exciting fitness workshops/webinars

 - Vibrant office with well-stocked pantry



Find out more about Coinhako @ https://www.coinhako.com/ and don't forget to visit our Careers Page @ https://www.coinhako.com/join-us!



By submitting your application to us, you consent to the collection, use, disclosure and processing of your personal data in accordance with our privacy policy, which is accessible at https://www.coinhako.com/legal/sg-1/privacy_policy.

source_jobs.title: Human Resource Intern
source_jobs.description:
Are you passionate about people and eager to kickstart your career in Human Resources? We're looking for a motivated and detail-oriented HR Intern to support our team across a wide range of HR functions. This is an exciting opportunity to gain hands-on experience in a fast-paced, start-up environment.



What you'll be doing:

 - Support employee onboarding and offboarding processes

 - Assist in policy documentation and HR projects, including performance management activities

 - Help maintain employee records, HR files, HRIS data entry and updates, ensuring accuracy and compliance

 - Support employee engagement initiatives and day-to-day HR operations

 - Provide support in preparing and coordinating payroll, tax, insurance administration

 - Contribute to recruitment activities such as job postings, interview coordination, and candidate experience

What we're looking for:

 - Currently pursuing a degree in Human Resources, Business, or a related field

 - Strong attention to detail, organized, and proactive

 - Familiar with integrating AI tools to optimize workflows and efficiency.

 - Proficient in MS Excel, PowerPoint, Google Workspace, and Canva.

 - Good communication skills and a team player mindset

 - Comfortable working in a dynamic start-up environment

 - Curious and willing to learn across different areas of HR

 - Able to commit to working at least 3 days per week for a minimum of 6 months

What’s in it for you:

 - Friendly and fun start-up work culture

 - Internship allowances.

 - Working in a professional, friendly, well-equipped environment both with foreigners and Vietnamese.

 - Extensive on job training, you will always have a chance to work with new emerging technologies.

 - Vibrant office with a well-stocked pantry

 - You'll be part of a collaborative, people-first culture where your contributions make an impact. If you're curious, adaptable, and excited to learn, we’d love to hear from you!
   
   

Find out more about Coinhako here https://www.coinhako.com/ and don't forget to visit our Careers Page https://www.coinhako.com/join-us



By submitting your application to us, you consent to the collection, use, disclosure and processing of your personal data in accordance with our privacy policy, which is accessible at https://www.coinhako.com/legal/sg-1/privacy_policy.

source_jobs.title: Crypto Options Trader
source_jobs.description:
What you'll be doing:

 - Contribute to a trading book and generate revenues and manage risk for the respective business

 - Pricing & Volatility: Implement volatility models and maintain real-time volatility surfaces for crypto assets like Bitcoin and Ethereum. Principal market maker for the various crypto assets.

 - Risk Management: Monitor and manage the trading book's risk, ensuring Delta, Gamma, Vega, Theta, and Rho exposures are within strict limits.

 - Strategy Execution: Develop and refine systematic strategies to identify short-term mispricing and execute market-making operations.

 - Research & Development: Partner with developers to backtest, prototype, and deploy new options strategies. Develop new products for distribution

 - Post-Trade Analysis: Perform deep-dive P&L and Greek exposure analysis to evaluate performance and optimize trading models.

 - Work in close partnership with control functions such as Legal, Compliance, Risk, and Finance in order to ensure appropriate governance and control infrastructure



What we're looking for:

 - Education: Degree in Financial Engineering, Mathematics, Physics, Computer Science, or Economics from a top-tier institution.

 - Experience: Typically 3+ years of hands-on experience in options trading (equities, FX, or crypto) and algorithmic market making.

 - Technical Skills: Strong programming capabilities, particularly in Python

 - Market Knowledge: In-depth understanding of FX, equity and crypto market mechanics (CeFi, DeFi, perpetual futures, and margin models).

 

What’s in it for you:

 - Friendly and fun start-up work culture

 - Convenient work location located in the heart of CBD area

 - Generous annual leaves on top of national holidays

 - Medical coverage including GP, Specialist, TCM, and more

 - Self-care benefits and exciting fitness workshops/webinars

 - Vibrant office with a well-stocked pantry

 

Find out more about Coinhako here https://www.coinhako.com/ and don't forget to visit our Careers Page https://www.coinhako.com/join-us

source_jobs.title: Senior Engineer - Payment & Wallet
Finance Intern
source_jobs.description:
We are looking for motivated individuals to join Coinhako as a Finance Intern in 2026. This internship is designed to give students meaningful, hands-on exposure to the finance function within a fast-moving fintech environment. You will work closely with the team on day-to-day operations, gaining practical insight into the processes and workflows that keep a financial services business running. By the end of your internship, you will come away with a solid grounding in finance fundamentals and a clearer picture of what a career in this space looks like.



What you'll be doing:

Financial Record Keeping

 - Maintain the general ledger and accounting records

 - Record and reconcile financial transactions accurately and in a timely manner

 - Process journal entries and account adjustments

 - Maintain supporting schedules and documentation

Accounts Payable & Receivable

 - Review and process supplier invoices and payments

 - Monitor customer receivables and follow up on outstanding balances

 - Perform vendor and customer reconciliations

Month-End & Year-End Closing

 - Prepare month-end closing journals and reconciliations

 - Reconcile bank accounts, intercompany balances, and key balance sheet accounts

 - Investigate and resolve reconciling items

 - Support year-end financial closing and audit processes

Financial Reporting

 - Prepare management accounts and financial reports

 - Assist in the preparation of statutory financial statements

Fintech / Digital Asset Operations

 - Reconcile digital asset balances across wallets, exchanges, and custodians

 - Perform daily and month-end Asset-Liability Management (ALM) reconciliations

 - Prepare mark-to-market valuations for digital assets

 - Reconcile customer asset segregation accounts

 - Monitor settlement positions with liquidity providers and counterparties

 - Support MAS regulatory reporting and capital calculations

 - Investigate blockchain transaction discrepancies and operational breaks

 - Prepare crypto-specific audit schedules and impairment assessments

 - Support system implementation and other ad-hoc project work

 

What we're looking for:

 - Currently pursuing a degree in Accounting, Business, Finance, Economics or related field.

 - Strong communication and interpersonal skills

 - Comfortable working in a fast-paced work environment

 - Ability to commit to a 6 months full-time internship

 

What’s in it for you:

 - Friendly and fun start-up work culture

 - Convenient work location located in the heart of CBD area

 - Vibrant office with a well-stocked pantry
   
   

Find out more about Coinhako here https://www.coinhako.com/ and don't forget to visit our Careers Page https://www.coinhako.com/join-us



By submitting your application to us, you consent to the collection, use, disclosure and processing of your personal data in accordance with our privacy policy, which is accessible at https://www.coinhako.com/legal/sg-1/privacy_policy.

source_jobs.title: Head of Engineering
source_jobs.description:
The Head of Engineering will be responsible for leading the product engineering strategy and execution for the organization. This individual will work closely with the executive team, product managers, and other stakeholders to ensure that all product engineering efforts align with business objectives, market needs, and technical excellence.

You will build, manage, and mentor a high-performing engineering team, providing leadership across various product development initiatives. As a hands-on leader, you will oversee the entire product development lifecycle, from ideation to deployment, ensuring the delivery of robust, secure, and user-friendly crypto solutions.



What you'll be doing:

 - Strategic Leadership:
   
   - Define and execute the technical vision and strategy for the platform, ensuring alignment with the company’s goals.
   
   - Lead the engineering team to build scalable, secure, and high-performance features for the exchange, with a focus on availability, security, and usability.
   
   - Collaborate with executive leadership and product managers to create and refine the engineering roadmap, prioritizing key initiatives to drive business growth.

 - Team Leadership and Development:
   
   - Manage, mentor, and inspire a team of product engineers, fostering a culture of technical excellence, innovation, and accountability.
   
   - Recruit top talent, develop engineering leadership within the team, and establish career development frameworks to grow internal talent.
   
   - Encourage cross-functional collaboration and ensure effective communication between engineering, product, UX/UI, security, and operations teams.

 - Product Development and Delivery:
   
   - Oversee the end-to-end product engineering lifecycle, from ideation to implementation, ensuring features are delivered on time, on budget, and to the highest quality standards.
   
   - Provide leadership in the architecture and design of scalable, low-latency systems, ensuring high throughput for trading operations.
   
   - Drive continuous product improvements, responding quickly to market changes and customer feedback, while ensuring regulatory compliance and security standards.

 - Platform Scalability and Performance:
   
   - Ensure the platform is optimized for scalability, with the ability to handle high volumes of transactions, low latency, and seamless performance during peak periods.
   
   - Champion best practices in software engineering, including automated testing, continuous integration, and monitoring.
   
   - Manage and improve the platform’s infrastructure, focusing on high availability, redundancy, and disaster recovery processes.

 - Security and Compliance:
   
   - Ensure that platform security is a top priority, implementing best practices and industry standards for data protection, anti-money laundering (AML), and know your customer (KYC) compliance.
   
   - Lead initiatives to continuously evaluate and enhance the platform’s security posture, proactively identifying and mitigating risks.
   
   - Work with the legal and compliance teams to ensure that product development and engineering are aligned with regulatory requirements.

 - Innovation and Market Leadership:
   
   - Stay at the forefront of emerging trends in fintech, blockchain, and digital asset exchanges, driving the adoption of new technologies and practices to improve the platform.
   
   - Conduct research and development on innovative solutions to enhance the exchange’s capabilities, such as enhanced trading algorithms, risk management tools, and blockchain integrations.

 - Process Improvement and Efficiency:
   
   - Establish and refine engineering processes to enhance efficiency, transparency, and collaboration across teams.
   
   - Implement metrics and performance KPIs to measure the success of engineering initiatives and the overall product engineering function.



What we're looking for:

 - Experience:
   
   - Minimum of 10+ years of experience in

source_jobs.title: Transaction Monitoring Analyst
source_jobs.description:
What you'll be doing:

 - As part of the Coinhako transaction monitoring team monitoring for suspicious transactions performing shift duties (day and evening). Please note shift work is mandatory and non-negotiable.

 - Assist in reviewing profiles and transactions flagged or escalated within the KYC/AML process.

 - Assist the transaction monitoring team with further investigations, if necessary, and ensure timely escalation to senior compliance function.

 - Oversee daily triggered transactions alerts, investigate, and ensure timely escalation of all potential scam alerts, and liaise with Singapore Police Force-Anti-Scam Centre.

 - Oversee daily triggered blockchain (“on-chain”) monitoring alerts, conduct investigations, and ensure timely escalation of alerts where necessary.

 - File a suspicious transaction report to Singapore Police Force-Commercial Affairs Department through an e-platform submission portal, SONAR.

 - Assist, handle and liaise with SPF for Production and Freezing Orders

 - Expedite, screen and monitor registered Money Mules and Mule accounts.

 - Assist on anti-scam/fraud projects and testing controls

 - Other ad-hoc AML compliance duties assigned by the compliance management.

 - This role reports directly to the Chief Compliance Officer.

 - This role has a dotted line reporting to team supervisory leads with regards to daily operational transaction monitoring matters.



What we're looking for:

 - Preferably a bachelor’s degree in law, finance or technology

 - Diploma in Law or Technology candidates will be considered.

 - Preferably 1-3 years of experience in AML transaction monitoring and technology skills will be advantageous.

 - The candidate to have a good understanding and/or experience working in a cryptocurrency and blockchain environment, traditional finance or capital markets trading industry.

 - Preferably to have obtained recognised AML certifications (ACAMS or ICA) and must be able to commit to shift hours (AM and PM).

 - Strong analytical skills with capability to work independently with minimal supervision, and ex-police or military officers will also be considered.

 - Strong problem-solving skills and able to multitask.

 - Strong team player, interpersonal, presentation and communication skills.

 - Committed and passionate to go beyond the extra mile to succeed in this role.

 - Adaptable in an ever-evolving digital environment.

 - Working in the office is expected for day shifts.



What’s in it for you:

 - Friendly and fun start-up work culture

 - Convenient work location located in the heart of CBD area

 - Generous annual leaves on top of national holidays

 - Medical coverage including GP, Specialist, TCM, and more

 - Self-care benefits and exciting fitness workshops/webinars

 - Vibrant office with a well-stocked pantry



Find out more about Coinhako here https://www.coinhako.com/ and don't forget to visit our Careers Page https://www.coinhako.com/join-us

source_jobs.title: Senior Security Engineer, Governance Risk and Compliance
source_jobs.description:
We are operating at the fast-moving frontier of the crypto ecosystem, where trust, speed, and ironclad security are paramount to our success. We aren't looking for a passive bureaucrat or a traditional checklist-checker. We need a sharp, highly autonomous Senior Engineer, GRC who genuinely loves the details, anticipates gaps before dashboards turn red, and possesses the human judgment to steer modern, tech-forward security frameworks. If you thrive in high-stakes environments and know how to balance real risk mitigation against empty paperwork, you’ll fit right in.



What you'll be doing:

 - Compliance lifecycle: Maintain ISO 27001 certification, prepare for SOC 2 Type 1 and 2, manage auditor relationships, and own evidence collection in Vanta. You know what's slipping before the dashboard turns red, and can forecast certification timelines confidently.

 - Vulnerability management (as a program): Own the SLA layer — weekly dashboard, breach escalation, exception tracking, and monthly leadership view. Engineers fix the bugs; you ensure they fix them on time.

 - Policy lifecycle: Annual reviews, new policies as scope expands, training rollout, attestation tracking, and exception requests. Reviews run through an adversarial AI pipeline today; you'll own the cadence and the human judgment inside it.

 - People-ops security controls: Onboarding/offboarding evidence, access reviews, security awareness training, background-check tracking, and permission groups. Partner with HR on the workflow; own the auditable artifact.

 - Vendor risk: Vendor inventory, pre-procurement assessments, and annual reassessments.

 - Risk program: Maintain the risk register and run quarterly reviews.

 - Data protection: DLP policy and tuning, data-classification programs, and PDPA partnership with Legal.

 - Business continuity: Own the BCP/DR program — documentation, drills, and post-exercise improvements.
   
   

What we're looking for:

 - 3–5 years in security or GRC program management, ideally at a fintech that grew through early stages.

 - Hands-on experience running ISO 27001 and SOC 2 audits end-to-end, including auditor management.

 - Deep fluency in Vanta (or Drata, with willingness to switch). You know where the platform helps and where you have to compensate manually.

 - Confident representing the security program to security teams — both technically and as a trust signal.

 - Strong written and verbal communication.

 - Sound judgment on when a control gap is real risk vs. paperwork, and the ability to escalate to the right audience quickly.

 - Strong interest in Cryptocurrency, Blockchain, Fintech, or Finance/Trading — you follow the space, understand why it's a uniquely hostile threat environment, and want to defend it.

 - Proficient in English communication skill.
   
   

What’s in it for you:

 - MacBook or high-end laptop for working.

 - Full coverage of social insurance.

 - Premium health care for you and your family members.

 - Full 100% salary during probationary period.

 - Working in a professional, friendly, well-equipped workspace with both foreigners and Vietnamese.

 - Extensive on job training; will always having chances to work with new emerging technologies.

 - Friendly and fun start-up work culture.



Find out more about Coinhako here https://www.coinhako.com/ and don't forget to visit our Careers Page https://www.coinhako.com/join-us



By submitting your application to us, you consent to the collection, use, disclosure and processing of your personal data in accordance with our privacy policy, which is accessible at https://www.coinhako.com/legal/sg-1/privacy_policy.

notes: Fintech company with a mix of engineering, finance, and operations roles.
